/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsermctp.so.1 -o libsermctp.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/sermctp.dir/BcastMessenger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sermctp.dir/LinuxMctpSerial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sermctp.dir/MctpBridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sermctp.dir/MctpFramer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sermctp.dir/MctpNetlink.cpp.o  -lnl-genl-3 -lnl-route-3 -lnl-3
